samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Output wave.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="INCREMENT" value="1">Increment value.</param>
        <param id="DECREMENT" value="1">Decrement value.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    state and wave registers.
    state is 0, wave is incremented.
    state is 1, wave is decremented.
    </implementation>
</module>
